channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden Detains Two for Helping Russia Evade Sanctions with High-Tech Shipments
item.description: Swedish Security Service arrested two suspects, a Swedish and Turkish national, for violating EU sanctions by allegedly facilitating advanced technology shipments to Russia that could aid its war in Ukraine.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Minister Vows Continued Support for Ukraine Despite Domestic Political Turmoil
item.description: Europe Minister Stephen Doughty told the Kyiv Independent that Britain remains "resolutely behind Ukraine" even as Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces calls to resign after Labour losses in local elections.

item.title: ⚓ US Navy Reveals Trump Class Battleships Will Be Nuclear Powered
item.description: The Navy annual shipbuilding plan confirms future Trump class BBGNs will use nuclear propulsion, reversing earlier position. Each 35,000-ton warship estimated at $17 billion with hypersonic missiles and railguns.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Sent Iron Dome to UAE During Iran War, Huckabee Confirms
item.description: Jerusalem Post reports Israel deployed Iron Dome batteries to the UAE during the Iran conflict, marking deepening military cooperation between the two nations amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇱🇧 IDF Uses Robots to Advance Beyond Lebanons Litani River
item.description: Jerusalem Post reports Israeli forces are employing robotic systems to move north of the Litani River in Lebanon, with FPV drones continuing to challenge military operations in the area.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky ex-chief of staff Yermak charged in corruption probe
item.description: Andriy Yermak, former chief of staff to President Zelensky and Ukraine's lead negotiator with the US, has been named as a suspect in a major money-laundering investigation tied to luxury development near Kyiv. Six people have been charged in the anti-corruption sweep.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump and Xi Seek to Manage Differences on Iran War During China Summit
item.description: US President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping are attempting to keep their deep disagreements over the Iran war from overshadowing their summit in Beijing, the first US presidential visit to China in nearly a decade.

item.title: 💰 US Inflation Surges to 3.8% as Iran War Drives Up Energy Costs
item.description: US inflation rose to 3.8% in April, exceeding forecasts, as energy prices continued to climb amid the ongoing Iran conflict. The Federal Reserve faces pressure to maintain higher interest rates.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Faces Resignation Calls After Election Losses
item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is under pressure to resign after Labour suffered significant losses in local elections, with the right-wing Reform UK party making major gains.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Warns US Against Taiwan Arms Sales Ahead of Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Beijing issued strong warnings against continued US arms sales to Taiwan days before the Trump-Xi summit, complicating already tense negotiations over trade and the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇵🇸 UN Reports Israel Killing One Child Per Week in Occupied West Bank
item.description: A UN report documents that Israeli forces have killed at least one Palestinian child per week in the occupied West Bank since the beginning of 2026, raising international concern.

item.title: 🌍 Global Hantavirus Outbreak Spreads to Spain
item.description: Spain has confirmed a new case of hantavirus as the global outbreak continues to spread, with health authorities warning of increased risks in Europe.

item.title: 🛡️ NATO to Create Vetted Counter-Drone Vendor Pool for Member Nations
item.description: NATO is establishing a pre-vetted pool of counter-drone technology vendors to help member nations quickly acquire capabilities to address growing aerial threats.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkeys Aselsan Eyes Growth in Networked Mass-Producible Weapons
item.description: Turkish defense company Aselsan plans expansion in networked, mass-producible weapons systems as demand for scalable military technology grows amid global conflicts.

item.title: 🚢 US Navy Open to Building Ships Overseas, New Plan Says
item.description: The US Navy's latest shipbuilding plan signals openness to constructing vessels overseas, a significant shift as American shipyards struggle with capacity constraints.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japanese Petroleum Company Expects Hormuz Crisis to Subside in July
item.description: A major Japanese petroleum company projects the Strait of Hormuz crisis will ease by July, offering relief to energy markets concerned about prolonged disruptions.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Strikes Target US Firms in Ukraine Amid Tensions
item.description: Russian forces have targeted facilities linked to US companies in Ukraine, escalating economic warfare as diplomatic tensions between Washington and Moscow continue.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Alabama Redistricting Faces Supreme Court Challenge
item.description: The US Supreme Court is hearing arguments in a case challenging Alabama's congressional redistricting map, with implications for voting rights nationwide.

item.title: 🇻🇪 Venezuela-Guyana Dispute Over Essequibo Reaches International Court
item.description: The territorial dispute between Venezuela and Guyana over the oil-rich Essequibo region is being heard at the International Court of Justice, with implications for regional stability.

item.title: 🏥 WHO Warns Countries to Prepare for More Hantavirus Cases
item.description: The World Health Organization has issued a global warning for countries to prepare for additional hantavirus cases as the outbreak continues to spread internationally.

item.title: 🇮🇱 CNN: Trump More Seriously Considering Resuming Combat Operations in Iran
item.description: CNN reports that President Trump is giving more serious consideration to resuming combat operations against Iran as diplomatic efforts face increasing challenges.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russias Orenburg and Chelyabinsk Reportedly Hit by Drone Attack
item.description: Drone attacks targeted Russian regions of Orenburg and Chelyabinsk, 1,200 kilometers from Ukraine, following the end of the three-day Victory Day ceasefire.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Spain Reports New Hantavirus Case as Outbreak Grows to 11
item.description: Spain has reported another hantavirus case, bringing the total in the country to 11 as health authorities monitor the spread of the disease across Europe.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Haredi Spiritual Leader Greenlights Dissolving Knesset Over Draft Law
item.description: A Haredi spiritual leader has authorized Degel Hatorah to support dissolving the Knesset over proposed changes to Israels military draft law, threatening the coalition government.
